ab: Maqtu aak simul isu sui?
en: A: Can I borrow money from you?

ab: Maqtu! Piaq suu na simulun sui?
Sipungul aak madas sui, Maqtu aak simul isu sui?
ch: A:我忘記帶錢了，我可以跟你借錢嗎?
en: A: I forgot to bring money, can I borrow money from you?

ab: Uka nak amin dasun sui tu!
en: B: I don't have any money either!

ab: Panpungul aak madas sui, Maqtu aak simul su-uan sui?
ch: A:我忘記帶錢了，我可以跟你借錢嗎?
en: A: I forgot to bring money, can I borrow money from you?

ab: Nii aii! Sinimul aas tudip nii ang aas maisuqis.
ch: B:不要，上次借的錢你都還沒還我。
en: B: No, you haven't paid me back the money you borrowed last time.

ab: Maqtu aak simul isu hulus?
en: A: Can I borrow your clothes?

ab: Azuq, Anak i su siza.
en: B: Well, you take it yourself.

ab: Maqtu aak simul isu haqil?
en: A: Can I borrow your book?

ab: Pasimul zaku Mai-ia ta.
en: B: I lent it to Mai-ia.

ab: Pasimul ing aak isu Tauntaun maqtu?
ch: A:請借給我你的腳踏車好嗎?
en: A: Can I borrow your bicycle, please?

ab: Azuq, Qaal asa laqbingin suqaisun zakuan.
ch: B: 好，但是明天要還給我。
en: B: Okay, but you have to give it back to me tomorrow.

ab: Qudanan in, Uka nak Talulung dasun, Pasimuling aak Talulung?
ch: A:下雨了，我沒有帶傘，借我傘好嗎?
en: A: It's raining, I don't have an umbrella, can you lend me one?

ab: Musqa nak tas-a Talulung, Muskun ata talulungan!
ch: B: 我只有一把傘，我們一起撐吧!
en: B: I only have an umbrella, let's stick together!

ab: Ma Haqil i isu tudip sinpasimul zaku, Suqaisun in zaku.
ch: A:這是你上次借我的書，還給你。
en: A: This is the book you borrowed from me last time, I give it back to you.

ab: Na maaq su asaun muqna sadu Haqil maqtu amin taqu zaku.
ch: B:還想看什麼書都可以跟我說。
en: B:You can tell me what else you want to read.

ab: Laquaq aak masuqis suu sui?
en: A: When do I have to pay you back?

ab: Azuq, Maqi haizin suu sui a tudip in tupa.
ch: B:沒關係，你有錢的時候再說。
en: B: It's okay, you can talk about it when you have money.

ab: Laquaq ass masuqais zaku sui?
en: B: When are you going to pay me back?

ab: Na suqaisuk laqbingin su-uan.
en: A: I'll return it to you tomorrow.

ab: Na laquaq aas masuqis inak Haqil.
en: B: When are you going to return my book?

ab: Tupi suqaisuk in takna?
ch: B:我昨天不是已經還你了嗎?
en: A: Didn't I return it to you yesterday?

ab: Ispapatas dii isia Taliban pasimul aipa suu?
en: A: Did Taliban lend you this pen?

ab: Uu, Simul aak isia ta.
en: B: Yes, I borrowed it from him today.

ab: Ispapatas dii su’u simul han Taliban ta.
en: A: Did you borrow this pen from Taliban?

ab: Nii, Sinbaliv aipi Tina ta.
en: B: No, this is what mom bought.

ab: Uka in Qasilah, Ipin simul han Sani ta Qasilah.
en: A: We are out of salt, let's borrow some salt from Sani.

ab: Uu, Simul aak.
en: B: Okay, I'll borrow it.

ab: Tupa i Ibu a tu suqais i zakuan Sui.
en: B: Go and ask Sani to return my money.

ab: Piaq ista sinimulun su-uan Sui tu?
en: A: How much does she owe you?
